name: gatherit
title: Gather
description: Search, copy, and save your Gather design references without leaving the keyboard.
author: samuel_monteiro

commands.name: search-gather
commands.title: Search Gather
commands.subtitle: Gather
commands.description: Search your Gather reference library and copy any reference.

commands.name: save-to-gather
commands.title: Save to Gather
commands.subtitle: Gather
commands.description: Save a link or image to your Gather library.

tools.name: search-references
tools.title: Search References
tools.description: Search the user's Gather design-reference library by query, category, tags, and kind.

tools.name: get-reference
tools.title: Get Reference
tools.description: Fetch one Gather reference by id with its full metadata.

tools.name: list-categories
tools.title: List Categories
tools.description: List the user's Gather categories with reference counts.

tools.name: save-reference
tools.title: Save Reference
tools.description: Save a link or image URL to the user's Gather library.
